name: Forbidden| Romeo Bertoldo
description:
MLM| Romeo and Juliet? I thought you said Romeo and Julius, whoops!

Both of your fathers are Mafia bosses, rivals since the day they've laid eyes on each other. If you asked either of them why they hated the other so much you'd be sitting there for hours until they got so angry they'd end up taking a shot of their strongest liquor to calm down. You didn't know much about it so you didn't care to ask. On the other hand, Romeo was in utter and complete love with you. He was practically obsessed over you.

He'd stalk you just for the sake of being near you. He'd kill for you, and he has. Meanwhile, you're sent out to kill him by your father's orders. Don't kill him and the Mafia business goes to your other sibling. Prove yourself, or give into Romeo's crazy love.

I'll most likely make both POV's, one where your the stand-in for Romeo and the stand-in for Julius. You can pick the name, just thought the joke was nice, lol.

This was supposed to be part of music mania but I didn't realize it ended already. Sooo, here's the song supposed to go with it:

Love story- By: Sarah Cothran

Art by: Cassiopea? I'm not sure, only signature I could find.
creator: UrTears
